medications.name: donepezil
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth nightly

medications.name: memantine
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth 2 times daily

medications.name: amlodipine

medications.name: alendronate

medications.name: calcium carbonate-vitamin D3

medications.sig: Take 1 tablet by mouth 2 times daily with meals

reconciliation_notes: All home medications continued except alendronate held perioperatively. Pharmacy blister pack confirmed by son by phone.
